title: Lead Investment Banker at Grant Thornton India

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Grant Thornton India
jsonLd.description:
Grant Thornton India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Grant Thornton India:
Grant Thornton India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Tally

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grant Thornton India!
